tasks.subject: Task 1: Foundation packages (screen + styles)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the shared screen.Model contract + screen.ErrMsg, and move the five shared lipgloss styles into their own package.

**Files:**
- Create: internal/tui/screen/screen.go
- Create: internal/tui/styles/styles.go

**Verify:** go build ./... && go vet ./...

Pure declarations — verified by compilation, no unit test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/tui/screen/screen.go", "internal/tui/styles/styles.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["screen.Model + screen.ErrMsg declared", "styles exports Base/Active/SelectedItem/Title/Menu", "build and vet pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: repolist.Model (repository-selection screen)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract repo-selection into internal/tui/repolist implementing screen.Model and emitting RepoSelectedMsg.

**Files:**
- Create: internal/tui/repolist/repolist.go
- Test: internal/tui/repolist/repolist_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./internal/tui/repolist/... -v && go build ./... && go vet ./...

TDD: test first (fails undefined), then implementation, then commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/tui/repolist/repolist.go", "internal/tui/repolist/repolist_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/tui/repolist/... -v && go build ./... && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cursor clamps", "enter emits RepoSelectedMsg", "empty enter no-op", "reposMsg populates + clears loading", "errors return screen.ErrMsg"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: pr.Model (pull-request split-pane screen)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract the PR split-pane into internal/tui/pr implementing screen.Model; preserve original Update sequencing (handle msg, then forward raw msg to viewport).

**Files:**
- Create: internal/tui/pr/pr.go
- Test: internal/tui/pr/pr_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./internal/tui/pr/... -v && go build ./... && go vet ./...

TDD: test first, then implementation. Checkout/open cmds asserted non-nil, not executed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/tui/pr/pr.go", "internal/tui/pr/pr_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/tui/pr/... -v && go build ./... && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tab toggles focus", "cursor clamps in list focus", "c/o set message + emit cmd", "empty list c/o no-op", "prDataMsg populates + clears loading", "errors return screen.ErrMsg"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Router cutover (replace ui.go with router.go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace monolithic internal/tui/ui.go with a thin router in internal/tui/router.go owning only routing state, delegating to repolist/pr. Keep tui.NewModel() signature so main.go is unchanged. Atomic cutover.

**Files:**
- Create: internal/tui/router.go
- Delete: internal/tui/ui.go
- Test: internal/tui/router_test.go

**Verify:** go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... && gofmt -l internal cmd

TDD: test first, then git rm ui.go, then write router.go, then full verification + manual behavioral pass, then commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/tui/router.go", "internal/tui/router_test.go", "internal/tui/ui.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... && gofmt -l internal cmd", "acceptanceCriteria": ["NewModel repo-list active", "global quit + back keys", "RepoSelectedMsg builds pr and switches", "WindowSizeMsg broadcast to all children", "ErrMsg sticky overlay", "ui.go removed, main.go unchanged", "build/vet/test/gofmt clean"]}
```
